name: Salam
description: Islamic spiritual reflections app built with Flutter featuring daily Athkar and Quranic verses
longDescription: An Islamic app featuring daily spiritual reflections (Khutbah), Athkar, and Quranic verses. Built with Flutter and GetX for cross-platform compatibility, with full Arabic RTL support, smooth page navigation, and scheduled daily notifications.

name: Salam
description: A comprehensive refactoring project of an Android application containing over 500 pages of Arabic content. It was developed following the MVVM architecture and Material 3 visual identity. The application features full support for working without an internet connection (Offline-First) without requesting any network permissions to ensure the highest levels of privacy and performance, along with full font customization and instant sharing via WhatsApp.
longDescription: A comprehensive refactoring project of an Android application containing over 500 pages of Arabic content. It was developed following the MVVM architecture and Material 3 visual identity. The application features full support for working without an internet connection (Offline-First) without requesting any network permissions to ensure the highest levels of privacy and performance, along with full font customization and instant sharing via WhatsApp.

name: Athkarix
description: Islamic Athkar app built with Flutter
longDescription: An Islamic app featuring daily supplications (Athkar), and Quranic verses. Built with Flutter for cross-platform compatibility.

name: Developer Portfolio
description: Modern portfolio site built with Next.js 15 and TypeScript
longDescription: A fully responsive, multilingual portfolio website featuring dark mode, SEO optimization, and PWA capabilities. Demonstrates best practices in modern web development.

name: Voices of Truth
description: A multilingual directory of renowned Islamic scholars and preachers with Arabic RTL and English LTR support, featuring server-side filtering and smooth Framer Motion animations.
longDescription: Voices of Truth is a sophisticated web application that serves as a comprehensive directory of Islamic scholars and preachers worldwide. Built with Next.js 15 and leveraging Server Components for optimal performance, it features seamless internationalization supporting both Arabic (RTL) and English (LTR). The application includes advanced filtering capabilities by category, country, and language, along with a powerful search functionality. With a beautiful, responsive design enhanced by Framer Motion animations and a custom dark/light theme system, it demonstrates modern full-stack development practices and accessibility standards.

name: Khwater
description: Spiritual and intellectual reflections inspired by Islamic values, bringing the beauty of Islamic reflection into the digital world.
longDescription: Khwater – Reflections on Faith & Life is a comprehensive spiritual application that presents Arabic, accessible, and elegant digital writings in a modern form. Originally built with Flutter, this project was fully migrated to Next.js (TypeScript) following a structured 7-phase migration plan. The application features PWA capabilities with offline mode, light/dark theme support, bookmarks functionality, advanced search, and full Arabic language support. Built with performance in mind using SSG and ISR, ensuring fast loading times while maintaining WCAG AA accessibility compliance and SEO optimization.

name: Huawei Router Control
description: Advanced router management and control system for Huawei devices
longDescription: A comprehensive router management system designed specifically for Huawei routers. This project provides advanced control features, monitoring capabilities, and automation tools for Huawei networking devices. Built with modern web technologies, it offers a user-friendly interface for managing router settings, monitoring network performance, and implementing security features.

name: New Muslim Stories
description: A multilingual platform showcasing inspiring stories of people who embraced Islam from around the world.
longDescription: New Muslim Stories is a modern, content-driven web application built with Next.js and TypeScript. It presents real-life stories of individuals who embraced Islam, highlighting their journeys, backgrounds, and moments of guidance. The platform focuses on a calm, spiritual user experience with multilingual support (Arabic RTL and English LTR), advanced filtering by country or background, search functionality, daily featured stories, and elegant animations using Framer Motion. Content is managed via Markdown or CMS, with a strong emphasis on accessibility, responsiveness, and emotional storytelling.

name: Bassaer (بصائر)
description: A modern, premium digital reading platform showcasing the Arabic book 'Insights into the Universe, Life, and Religion'.
longDescription: Bassaer is a beautifully designed, modern digital reading platform built with Next.js 15 App Router. It transforms a classical Arabic PDF book into an interactive, zero-latency web application with beautiful RTL typography using the Tajawal font. The Python-based extraction phase uses PyMuPDF to parse and segment the 900+ page book into structured Markdown chapters. The web platform then renders these with react-markdown and features an elegant 'Parchment & Ink' light/dark mode, a sticky sidebar table of contents, and smooth sequential navigation for the ultimate reading experience.

name: Athkari
description: A minimalist Islamic application rebuilt from scratch as a native Android app using Kotlin and MVVM architecture, achieving a remarkable ~2 MB footprint.
longDescription: A minimalist Islamic application that combines comprehensive spiritual content with a clean, distraction-free user experience. Following the initial Flutter version, the app was completely rewritten from scratch as a Native Android application using Kotlin and the MVVM architecture. Embodying a strictly minimalist design philosophy, 'Azkari' eliminates unnecessary visual clutter and advertisements, bringing the final APK size down to a remarkably lightweight ~2 MB. Features include an Offline-First approach, Daily Fortress (Morning, Evening, and Before-Sleep Supplications), Virtues & Formulations Guide, and an Integrated Digital Library containing the Book of Athkar and the Beautiful Names of Allah.

name: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire
description: An interactive trivia game built with React, TypeScript, and Vite
longDescription: An interactive trivia game built with React, TypeScript, and Vite featuring 15 questions across general knowledge topics, 3 lifelines (50:50, Audience Poll, Walk Away), a 30-second timer with SVG circular countdown, Tone.js audio effects, and PWA support for full offline play. Responsive RTL layout optimized for mobile.
